office_does: The auditor administers elections, recording, licensing, and county financial and public-record functions.
race_blurb: Appointed incumbent Brandt Cappell offers direct chief-deputy and auditor continuity; retired fire chief Brian Brett offers outside public-agency leadership.

candidates.summary: Cappell is the appointed incumbent and former chief deputy auditor emphasizing secure accessible elections, recording, licensing, continuity, and transparency.
highlights: Serves as appointed auditor after chief-deputy service [S1]
Emphasizes secure accessible elections and transparent administration [S1]

experience.basis: Current auditor and former chief-deputy service establish direct institutional experience.

candidates.summary: Brett is a retired fire chief emphasizing service leadership, election security, accountability, staff support, and trust.
highlights: Led a public agency as fire chief [S1]
Emphasizes accountability, staff support, and election security [S1]

spending.basis: Accountability is central to his administrative pitch, supporting an oversight lean.

experience.basis: Fire-chief service provides proven public-agency leadership, though outside the auditor office.
